name: All-Bran Seed Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, and sesame seeds.
2. In another bowl, beat together the orange juice, honey, eggs, vegetable oil, bran cereal, and poppy seeds until well combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir only until just combined.
4. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 8.5 x 4.5 x 2-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
6. Let cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and allow to cool completely before slicing.
